title: calicotome infesta
intro: Calicotome infesta, also known as Cytisus infestus or Robinia infesta, is a perennial shrub native to the Mediterranean region and the Iberian Peninsula. It belongs to the Fabaceae family and is commonly found in dry, sandy areas. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, thanks to its rich content of flavonoids and alkaloids. Calicotome infesta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and has been reported to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine.
